summary: FAIL-009 (PRED-105 silent-ignore) stat refresh — event-driven update triggered by 6th-consecutive auto-regen HOLD (commit f6a7b3d 2026-04-27T07:42:24Z) AND 10-day manual-commit drought crossing. Both conditions were named as escalation watchpoints in the 04-25T23 analysis RA-2 deferral.

proposed_field_replacements.summary: PRED-105 cucumber-growth (46° copper coils, 14-day window) closed 2026-04-18, dome silent ~226 hours (~9.42 days) later — pipeline-canonical 6-day streak across daily_review auto-regens

watchpoints_for_next_run: PRED-106 EOM closure (~2.5d) — if also silent-ignored, escalates to N=2 pipeline pattern
7th auto-regen ~07:00Z 2026-04-28 — HOLD extends streak to 7; JUMP to refined=5 silently absorbs PRED-105 (CRITICAL goalpost rewrite trigger)
Drought break (any manual commit) — substantive minimum, requires parameter/canary diff

other_side_of_argument.defender_position: daily_review.json is just a snapshot tool; humans adjudicate off-cycle. Auto-pipeline's caution is correct design (no auto-flunking).
other_side_of_argument.our_counter: Granted on the design principle. Critique is that public posture ("actively monitored") is mismatched with pipeline behavior on window-expired-unadjudicated. Fix would be either (i) human-review SLA timestamp on PRED-105 or (ii) intermediate "window-closed-pending-review" state. Six daily regens without either step makes the silence structurally indefinite.
